_comment: Asked & Answered — Slack app manifest (App A, internal/sandbox). Import at api.slack.com/apps → Create New App → From a manifest. Verify agent_view + scopes against the live sandbox in spike S1 before relying on them.

display_information.name: Asked & Answered
display_information.description: Turns your Slack history into completed security questionnaires — cited, approved, fail-closed.
display_information.long_description: Every security questionnaire asks questions your team already answered somewhere in Slack. Asked & Answered finds that evidence with Real-Time Search, drafts cited answers, and routes anything it can't prove to a human. It never invents a compliance answer. Approved answers compound into a reusable, permission-aware library, and every approval is logged to a tamper-evident ledger.

assistant_view.assistant_description: Answers security questionnaires from your workspace evidence — cited and approval-gated.

suggested_prompts.title: How does verification work?
suggested_prompts.message: How do you decide Verified vs Needs SME?

check_asked_answered.title: Check Asked & Answered
check_asked_answered.description: Run a fail-closed questionnaire check against the approved answer library and workspace evidence.

questions.description: Questionnaire text, one question per line

results.description: JSON array of {question, status, answer, citations, approvedBy}
